project.tagline: AI-powered developer intelligence platform — personalized tech radars from HackerNews, GitHub, and security advisories
metrics: Gemini 2.5 Flash AI with Agentic Tool-Calling

techStack.backend: Java 21, Spring Boot 3.5, MySQL 8, Liquibase, Redis Pub/Sub
techStack.frontend: React 18, Redux Toolkit (RTK Query), Material UI 5
techStack.ai: Google Gemini 2.5 Flash — agentic orchestration with multi-turn tool-calling
techStack.auth: JWT (HS512) + GitHub OAuth 2.0 + encrypted token storage (AES-256)
techStack.streaming: Server-Sent Events (SSE) via Redis Pub/Sub (Cloud Run multi-instance safe)
techStack.deployment: Google Cloud Run (serverless), Cloud SQL, Secret Manager, Artifact Registry
techStack.testing: JUnit 5, Testcontainers, Mockito, Vitest, React Testing Library, MSW

screenshots.title: Landing Page
screenshots.hotspot: Hero headline: 'Know what changed in your stack before it breaks your build'
screenshots.tooltip: Dev Radar scans your repos, matches CVEs against your dependency tree, and opens fix PRs — all in one weekly radar

screenshots.title: Features Overview
screenshots.hotspot: Connect GitHub and View Sample Radar CTA buttons
screenshots.tooltip: One-click GitHub OAuth connects your account and scans repos to auto-detect your tech stack

screenshots.title: Authentication
screenshots.tooltip: GitHub OAuth login — connects your account to enable repo scanning, dependency monitoring, and automated PR proposals

screenshots.title: Smart Onboarding
screenshots.hotspot: 3-step stepper: Scan Repos → Choose Interests → Generate Radar
screenshots.tooltip: Guided onboarding scans your GitHub repos to auto-detect languages, frameworks, and topics — no manual setup needed

screenshots.title: Interest Picker
screenshots.hotspot: Category-organized tag grid with selected chips (Java, Python, TypeScript, Spring Boot, React)
screenshots.tooltip: Curate your radar from 50+ technology tags across Languages, Frameworks, Databases, DevOps, and Security categories

screenshots.title: Dashboard
screenshots.hotspot: Radar Status card showing 'Your latest radar is ready' with View radars button
screenshots.tooltip: Personalized dashboard with dependency health, radar status, usage stats, and quick action buttons

screenshots.title: Radar History
screenshots.hotspot: 'Generate new radar' button and radar rows showing themes/tokens/time metadata
screenshots.tooltip: One-click radar generation triggers an agentic AI pipeline — track token usage, generation time, and theme counts per radar

screenshots.title: Live SSE Streaming
screenshots.hotspot: Pulsing dot indicator with 'Generating themes... 0 of 4' and skeleton placeholder cards
screenshots.tooltip: Real-time Server-Sent Events streaming — watch the Gemini AI agent search, score, and curate themes live with skeleton loading

screenshots.title: Completed Radar
screenshots.hotspot: First theme card 'docker-java 3.5.1 Released' with source badge, engagement buttons, and share action
screenshots.tooltip: Themed radar sections with AI-curated summaries, source attribution badges, thumbs up/down engagement tracking, and one-click sharing

screenshots.title: Full Radar with CVE Alerts
screenshots.hotspot: CRITICAL CVE theme cards at bottom with red security warning icons (SQL Injection, Auth Bypass)
screenshots.tooltip: Security advisories get red CRITICAL CVE highlights — GHSA-sourced vulnerabilities with severity indicators and actionable remediation guidance

screenshots.title: Observability Dashboard
screenshots.hotspot: Metrics grid: Radars Generated, Tokens Used, Avg Latency, Cache Hit Rate, Eval scores, and Token Usage trend chart
screenshots.tooltip: Public observability dashboard — real-time Micrometer metrics with request counts, latency percentiles, token tracking, and trend charts

screenshots.title: GitHub Integration
screenshots.hotspot: GitHub connection status section with Connect button
screenshots.tooltip: GitHub integration settings — connect your account to enable repo scanning, CVE monitoring, and automated fix PR proposals

screenshots.title: Email Digests
screenshots.hotspot: Email toggle and day/time scheduling selectors for weekly digest delivery
screenshots.tooltip: Schedule weekly email digests — choose delivery day and time for personalized radar summaries in your inbox

screenshots.title: Team Collaboration
screenshots.hotspot: Team dashboard with create team form and member management
screenshots.tooltip: Team collaboration — create teams, invite members by email, assign roles (Owner/Admin/Member), and generate shared radars

screenshots.title: API Key Management
screenshots.hotspot: API keys section with Create Key button for MCP/IDE integrations
screenshots.tooltip: MCP & IDE integration — generate API keys for Cursor, VS Code, or custom tool integrations via the Spring AI MCP server
